# Requirements Quality Checklist: Optimize and refine workspace package management

**Purpose**: Validate completeness, clarity, and acceptance quality of requirements
**Created**: 2026-03-16
**Feature**: [specs/028-refine-package-management/spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are all required root scripts explicitly listed (setup, install, dev, build, test, lint, clean)? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001/FR-005]
- [x] CHK002 Are workspace discovery and local package linking rules specified beyond "use workspaces"? [Completeness, Spec §FR-002]
- [x] CHK003 Are global lint and format rule responsibilities (root vs package) explicitly defined? [Completeness, Spec §FR-003]
- [x] CHK004 Are documentation requirements specific to dev/production/CI command sets? [Completeness, Spec §FR-004]
- [x] CHK005 Are cleanup requirements explicit about which artifacts are removed and which are preserved? [Completeness, Spec §FR-005]
- [x] CHK006 Is a package naming convention required by the spec (not only in contracts)? [Gap]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK007 Is the "single root command" fully specified with the exact command name and scope? [Clarity, Spec §用户场景1]
- [x] CHK008 Are "script consistency" requirements clear about the exact script set and naming? [Clarity, Spec §用户场景2]
- [x] CHK009 Are dependency hoisting rules clear about which dependencies qualify and when to retain local versions? [Clarity, Spec §用户场景3]
- [x] CHK010 Are local package linking expectations (e.g., workspace protocol) explicitly stated? [Clarity, Spec §FR-002]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK011 Are acceptance scenarios for US1/US2 measurable with explicit commands and expected outcomes? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §用户场景1/§用户场景2]
- [x] CHK012 Are SC-001 and SC-003 defined with measurable baselines and measurement methods? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001/§SC-003]
- [x] CHK013 Is SC-002 precise about what counts as "100% of subproject tests"? [Measurability, Spec §SC-002]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK014 Are CI and production workflows explicitly covered beyond the documentation requirement? [Coverage, Spec §FR-004]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [x] CHK015 Are toolchain assumptions explicit (npm vs pnpm support boundaries)? [Assumption, Spec §FR-002]
- [x] CHK016 Are assumptions about npm hoisting behavior documented and bounded? [Assumption, Spec §用户场景3]
